title: A Humanoid Robot Is Now Working Alone on a Real Factory Floor
script: A humanoid robot is now working alone on a real factory floor. Figure AI's Figure 02 robot is deployed in BMW's Spartanburg, South Carolina plant — picking up sheet metal parts, inspecting them, and transferring them between stations without human help. The robot completes each task in under 60 seconds. BMW employs 11,000 people at that plant. Humanoid robots just clocked in for their first real shift.
